item.title: Iron Snail: Why The Greatest Fatigue Pants Ever Made Are Also The Cheapest.
item.description:
**TITLE-ONLY**

* The OG-107 fatigue pants are widely considered the greatest military trousers ever produced due to their timeless design and versatility.
* Despite their legendary status, they remain incredibly affordable because of the massive surplus of stock available from their original production.
* The pants feature a high-quality cotton sateen fabric that becomes more comfortable and develops a unique character with age.
* Their functional, minimalist construction—including large patch pockets and a straight-leg fit—makes them a staple piece that pairs well with almost any wardrobe.
* The combination of historical durability, effortless style, and low entry price makes them a superior alternative to expensive, modern reproductions.
